untranslatable_reason: Signal requires analysis of: (1) trend direction identification, (2) candle color interpretation as probability signal, (3) breakout direction classification, (4) 12-month range positioning context, and (5) probabilistic outcome tables (reversal vs continuation rates by market regime). These qualitative multi-factor contextual analyses cannot be expressed using only the allowed indicators and operators. The pattern requires historical range lookback, trend regime detection, and probabilistic thresholds that exceed the scope of simple indicator comparisons.
translation_notes: This is a complex pattern recognition signal that fundamentally requires: (a) explicit trend detection (not just MA comparison), (b) body color analysis as a probability weighting factor, (c) position within 12-month Donchian range (would need dc_upper/dc_lower over 252-bar period, not available), and (d) conditional probability branching based on market regime. The reversal/continuation rates (65%/35% for bull up-breakout-down, etc.) suggest a machine learning classifier rather than a rule-based system. A simplified approximation using moving averages and body direction is provided above, but it loses the nuanced probabilistic and contextual logic of the original signal.
